name: Michael "5000" Watts
description: '''Michael "5000" Watts''' ({{Birth based on age at death|52|2026|01|30|slash=yes}} – January 30, 2026) was an American DJ and entrepreneur who co-founded the record label [[Swishahouse]]. He is credited as one of the primary figures responsible for promoting Houston hip-hop—particularly its characteristic [[chopped and screwed]] style—to a national audience in the early 2000s.
